SYM_JM_EAR_FLUID_DRAINAGE.description: Ear discharge is any fluid coming from the ear.

EXM_CRP_EAR_EXAMINATION.name: Ear Examination
EXM_CRP_EAR_EXAMINATION.description: Examination and visual inspection of the patient's ears, including the ear canal and the eardrum. \n\nRequired room: Any office / Diagnostic unit

EXM_JM_AUDIOMETRY.name: Audiometry
EXM_JM_AUDIOMETRY.description: Audiometric test determine patient's level of hearing. \n\nRequired room: Any office / Diagnostic unit

EXM_OTOR_LARYNGOSCOPY.name: Laryngoscopy
EXM_OTOR_LARYNGOSCOPY.description: Endoscopial examination of the larynx to obtain view of the vocal cords, glottis. Facilitates tracheal intubation. \n\nRequired room: doctor's office / Observation room / ICU

EXM_JM_LARYNGOSCOPY.name: Laryngoscopy
EXM_JM_LARYNGOSCOPY.description: Endoscopial examination of the larynx to obtain view of the vocal cords, glottis. Facilitates tracheal intubation. \n\nRequired room: doctor's office / Observation room / ICU

EXM_JM_SKIN_INJECTION_TEST.name: Skin Injection Test
EXM_JM_SKIN_INJECTION_TEST.description: Injection of a different small amounts of allergen extracts into the skin, usually on arm to confirm or deny the allergic reaction of the body. \n\nRequired room: Offices / Diagnostic units at Emergency dpt / ICU dpt / Neurology dpt
